description:
Blue Sky Plan 5 is open on the Windows desktop.

Your task is to assess the bone density at four specific implant sites and classify them according to the Misch Bone Density Scale.

1. If not already loaded, import the DICOM data from `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Patient_DICOM`.
2. Navigate to the following four potential implant sites:
   - Site #3 (Maxillary Right First Molar)
   - Site #8 (Maxillary Right Central Incisor)
   - Site #19 (Mandibular Left First Molar)
   - Site #30 (Mandibular Right First Molar)
3. At each site, measure the bone density (Hounsfield Units) in the center of the medullary/trabecular bone (avoiding cortical plates).
4. Classify each site using the Misch Scale:
   - D1: > 1250 HU
   - D2: 850 - 1250 HU
   - D3: 350 - 850 HU
   - D4: < 350 HU
5. Create a report file at `C:\Users\Docker\Documents\bone_quality_report.txt` with the format:
